title: Note du dépositaire - signature du Venezuela

pages.text:
Pelletier .M

Ambassade de France

Aux Elats - Unis

FEB 1 8 1954

.-- Doasler- 89

Arclerts

The Acting Secretary of State presents his compl1ments to Their Excellencies and Messieurs the Chiefs of

Mission of the Governments signatory to the Treaty of

Peace with Japan and has the honor to inform the Chief's of Mission that in accordance with the provisions of

Article VIII of the Agreement for the Settlement of

Disputes Arising Under Article 15(a). of the Treats of

Peace with Japan, opened for signature at Washington on

June 12, 1952, that Agreement was signed on behalf of the

Government of Venezuela on February 3, 1954 and entered into force between the Governments of Venezuela and

Japan on that date.

The Acting Secretary of State would be grateful 1f each Chief of Mission would forward this information to his Government.

Department of State,

Washington, February 9, 1954.

C$.B
